Veterans Benefits: South Dakota has no state individual income tax, provides veterans service assistance and employment preference, and exempts $200,000 of owner-occupied value for qualifying permanently and totally disabled veterans; qualifying surviving spouses may receive a $150,000 exemption.
LGBTQSource: HRC 2025 Pierre MEI scorecard and MAP South Dakota LGBTQ policy tally
Description: Small state-capital city on the Missouri River with a local VA outpatient clinic, Avera St. Mary's Hospital, and quick access to Lake Oahe and Lake Sharpe recreation. Pierre is affordable and tax-friendly, with strong fishing and park access, but retirees should weigh cold windy winters, limited big-city amenities, and conservative county-level politics.
